landing.heroDescription: A platform where ideas become products. Build a team, complete tasks — get tokens.

steps.step1Description: Describe your vision, set a token budget, and attract professionals to your team.
steps.step2Description: Bring your idea to life, enter the market, and strengthen the OpenTeam ecosystem.
steps.step3Description: Join the team and make a real contribution to the development of innovative products.
steps.step4Description: Every completed task brings you closer to success and earns you real OpenTeam tokens.

metadata.title: TeamHub — Your Idea, Our Team
